description: Volatility Turning-Point Radar - scores how primed the tape is for a vol spike (spike-risk) and for a vol peak (exhaustion) from leading canary signals across the vix-curve, VRP, GEX, credit and capitulation engines. data/vol-radar.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Volatility Turning-Point Radar - every 6h via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler, re-reading the canary feeds so the spike-risk and exhaustion scores track intraday regime shifts.
